name: set_zone_away_configuration
description: Update the away configuration settings for a specific zone, including away mode temperature preferences (minimum away temperature in celsius), preheating level, and control type (heating/cooling). This allows customizing how a zone behaves when the home is in away mode.

control_type.description: The control type for the zone in away mode (e.g., 'HEATING' for heating control)

minimum_away_temperature_celsius.description: The minimum temperature in celsius to maintain when the home is in away mode

preheating_level.description: The preheating level setting (e.g., 'OFF' to disable preheating)
